title: The Future of Web Development
excerpt: Exploring the latest trends and technologies shaping the future of web development in 2025.
content: Web development continues to evolve at a rapid pace. With the emergence of new frameworks, tools, and methodologies, developers must stay current to remain competitive. In this comprehensive guide, we'll explore the cutting-edge technologies that are defining the future of web development, including WebAssembly, progressive web apps, and the integration of AI in development workflows.
author: Alex Johnson

comments.author: Sarah Miller
comments.content: Great insights! I'm particularly excited about WebAssembly's potential.

comments.author: Mike Chen
comments.content: Would love to see more examples of AI integration in dev workflows.

title: Mastering React Hooks
excerpt: A deep dive into React Hooks and how they revolutionize functional component development.
content: React Hooks have transformed the way we write React applications. This article explores the most powerful hooks, best practices for custom hook development, and real-world examples that demonstrate their effectiveness in building scalable applications. We'll cover useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer, and custom hooks with practical implementations.
author: Emma Rodriguez

comments.author: David Kim
comments.content: The custom hook examples are incredibly helpful!

title: Building Accessible Web Applications
excerpt: Learn how to create web applications that are accessible to all users, regardless of ability.
content: Accessibility is not just a nice-to-have feature—it's essential for creating inclusive digital experiences. This comprehensive guide covers WCAG guidelines, ARIA attributes, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, and practical testing strategies to ensure your applications are truly accessible to everyone.
author: Jamal Washington
